column1: # Urban population share by state — Census of India 2011 (last full census; the
# 2021 census was not conducted). Treat as a slow-moving structural covariate.
# AP/Telangana figures are the post-bifurcation recalculations of Census 2011.
# DN is the merged UT (DNH 46.7% + Daman & Diu 75.2%
# Ladakh derived from Leh+Kargil districts of Census 2011 J&K.
# quality: official = straight from census tables; derived = recombined from census tables.
